ES open of day — seed to the first two major pivots

10 random sessions. Each shows the OPEN pre-phase (shaded): bar 1 seeds an H and an L, the label continues only on the side that breaks (inside bar → neither), the first leg ends at a single H/L pivot — then the engine runs to the 2nd confirmed major pivot, where the chart is cropped. Use ← → or the buttons.
